prompt: What's the stamp duty on a house costing £425,000? I'm a first-time buyer.
expected_output: Exact SDLT calculation using April 2025 rates: £6,250 total, 1.47% effective rate, with band-by-band breakdown

assertions.text: Response contains the exact figure £6,250 (not an approximation)
Response shows band breakdown: £0 on first £300,000, £6,250 on £300,001-£425,000 at 5%
Response uses post-April 2025 rates (FTB nil rate band £300,000, not £425,000)
Response mentions first-time buyer relief applies up to £500,000 cap
